title: SieveErrorKind not #[non_exhaustive] — will break callers on every new variant
description: SieveErrorKind is a public enum that will grow a new variant every time a new extension is implemented (next: UnsupportedComparator for comparator errors, then more for new extensions). Without #[non_exhaustive], any downstream code that exhaustively matches SieveErrorKind will fail to compile after an update. Mark the enum #[non_exhaustive] now while no one has published code against it, before this becomes a major breaking-change problem.
